sentence: 这次合作是我们友谊的开端。
pinyin: Zhè cì hézuò shì wǒmen yǒuyì de kāiduān.
english: This collaboration was the beginning of our friendship.

pinyin: Zhāodài bù zhōu, qǐng duōduō bāohán.
english: Sorry for any lapses in hospitality — please bear with us.

sentence: 这种材料易于清洁，很受欢迎。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng cáiliào yìyú qīngjié, hěn shòu huānyíng.
english: This material is easy to clean and very popular.

sentence: 他在日记里记述了这段经历。
pinyin: Tā zài rìjì lǐ jìshù le zhè duàn jīnglì.
english: He wrote an account of this experience in his diary.

sentence: 那位少妇推着婴儿车散步。
pinyin: Nà wèi shàofù tuī zhe yīng'érchē sànbù.
english: That young married woman was taking a walk pushing a stroller.
